meaning: 管理员,管理程序/hip//n.管理人的职位(职务)
examples: On Friday the company's administrators sought permission from a Melbourne court to keep operating.
Project-based learning has grown in popularity with teachers and administrators.
Some administrators maintain that drop-outs remain the single greatest problem in their schools.
The administrators said they hope to sell most of the business as a going concern.
The administrators of Southampton Leisure Holdings PLC remain locked in talks with the Pinnacle Group.
